title: cyclosorus subdentatus
intro: Cyclosorus subdentatus, also known as the Chinese leather fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which have been attributed to its rich content of bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Cyclosorus subdentatus include its potential to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its antioxidant and anti-aging properties. Cyclosorus subdentatus can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
